examples: When leaves fall, blooms fade, all drear.
Tell how his boyhood was one drear night-hour.
Was he to pay a year of his life to verify the certainty of being thrust into the drear realm of the null-talented?
Yet the attempt should surely be made, drear as that prospect is for a country that has haggled and failed twice since 1987.
As morning dawns, musicians stumble home to financial drear.
